reviews.comment:
Malísima atención en el mini Mercado. Entre con mi perrita caniche la semana pasada y la hice upa , y aún así me dijeron que el perro tenía q esperar afuera. Con quien pretendía q la deje si yo estaba sola? Las estaciones de servicio suelen ser PET FRIENDLY . Vale aclarar que la chiruza que atendía el kiosko se creía dueña y hablaba de muy mala manera . NO RECOMIENDO IR PARA NADA!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service at the mini-market. I went in with my poodle last week and held her in my arms, and they still told me the dog had to wait outside. Who did they expect me to leave her with if I was alone? Gas stations are usually pet-friendly. It's worth mentioning that the woman working at the kiosk acted like she owned the place and spoke very rudely. I DO NOT RECOMMEND GOING AT ALL!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRbklENmhBRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Siempre pierdo 20 o 30 minutos para cargar nafta es chica el espacio entre los surtidores y donde se carga aire a los neumaticos es muy poco,siempre un lio de autos,especialmente en temporada,es para ir con tiempo,no lo recomiendo si estas apurado.Las filas se hacen sobre la ruta😬

(Translated by Google)
I always waste 20 or 30 minutes getting gas. The space between the pumps is small, and the tire inflation point is very small. There's always a mess of cars, especially during peak season. I recommend going early. I don't recommend it if you're in a hurry. Lines form all over the road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnLWVpQW9BRRAB
